_comment: WORKED EXAMPLE of a real-hardware run report. It attests the sim-verified bell_pops2 design (quantum-proof-pops.json) and records what an actual QPU measured: X-basis counts over the Bell state, from which the held-out observable <X0X1> is recomputed (~0.94, below the noiseless +1.00 — that gap is real-device error). The sim score stays the canonical rank; this is a labeled hardware overlay. Counts are illustrative (synthetic NISQ-like noise); replace with your device's real counts via run_on_hardware.py.
